feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,375Chapters: 67/?Kudos: 34

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: Maybe, One Day
entry.summary:
Author: sensei_no_petu

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,857Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Arthur is a prince. Merlin is a servant. It seems simple enough. But is it really?One morning, Arthur cannot find Merlin and later discovers something personal about him, which makes him question the true nature of their relationship.

entry.title: Amber and Wild Thyme
entry.summary:
Author: Ginkgo_Biloba_Baggins

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,223Chapters: 15/33Kudos: 409

Summary: When Hunith arrives in Camelot with news of an attack, Merlin knows what he has to do. He is perfectly capable of driving away the likes of Kanen’s men by himself; he has been defending Ealdor since he was ten years old. However, he has no idea of the lengths Arthur will go to to protect his poor, misguided manservant - such as adopting a disguise and following him home. A Canon Era AU of S1 E10 The Moment of Truth

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 113,444Chapters: 20/20Kudos: 77

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Found a place so safe
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,324Chapters: 10/15Kudos: 9

Summary: It had been a week since Morgana returned to Camelot. A week of smiling at Uther. A week of playing the role of the perfect Lady the King had tried to mould her into. A week of reconnecting with Arthur after years of keeping him at arm’s length. She found that he was not the mirror of Uther she had once thought him to be. For the first time in a long while, she understood what Merlin saw in him. She had had her doubts, but now she was sure of it. Arthur could be a great King someday, but he needed all the help he could get, and one part of helping him was telling him the truth.

entry.title: Family Tree
entry.summary:
Author: everydayistuesday

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,716Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: Contrary to popular belief, Arthur isn't stupid. He knows that Merlin has secrets. As a matter of fact, he knows exactly what Merlin has been hiding from him for all these years: his grandfather is none other than Dragoon the Great. This... explains a lot.In which Arthur takes two plus two, comes up with five, rounds up to six, re-evaluates and decides on four and a half, before eventually coming up with four.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: The Bruise
entry.summary:
Author: hpalsowritessecretly

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,278Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 38

Summary: Merlin trips and Arthur becomes fixated on the resulting bruise. Meanwhile, Merlin tries to distract Arthur from finding out about his magic with some convoluted 4D chess. This is 30% them bickering and 70% vague smut. They don’t explicitly have sex but they do jerk each other off a few times.

entry.summary:
Author: schweet_heart

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,222Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 77

Summary: Shortly after Arthur is crowned and Merlin reveals his magic, he and Merlin take on a magical beast together. In retrospect, they probably could have planned things better. Written for Merthur Glompfest 2026.

entry.title: Dragon's Fulfilment
entry.summary:
Author: Amacerise

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,462Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Arthur, his Knights, and Merlin return from their quest to kill a hippogriff. But not without new secrets to whisper, new treasures to cherish, and a whole court to beguile into believing that Arthur and his manservant aren't married in everything but name. It's one year until Merlin gives birth to his clutch of dragonlings. What tribulations will follow in the meantime? Rating may go up, tags may change. This is primarily an exercise in discovery writing so bear with me for major pauses; hopefully it's not a mess.

entry.title: That's How Rumors Get Started
entry.summary:
Author: unrealitycheck

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,185Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 56

Summary: A flush crept up Brenna's face. She stuffed a bit of pheasant into her mouth, thinking as she chewed. ''I would rather like to kiss Merlin.'' ''Merlin?'' Rosie giggled again, dark eyes sparkling as she exchanged a glance with Gilda. ''I know everyone says he's a fool,'' said Brenna. ''But he's sweet. And I fancy he'd be a nice kisser.'' ''Oh, I'm sure he's a fine kisser.'' Rosie's smile was wicked. ''But you'd need an awful lot of luck to try and steal a kiss from that one. He only has eyes for the king.'' Or: The servants in the castle keep gossiping about Arthur and Merlin. After all, the two of them aren't exactly subtle.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: His Majesty My King
entry.summary:
Author: Bollsye

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,851Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 66

Summary: Arthur’s hand clenched into a fist, his entire body coiled like a drawn blade. Water dripped steadily from his armor, pooling at his feet, but he stood tall despite it every inch a king, the people could feel it in his energy.But his eyesHis eyes betrayed him.Confusion. Disbelief. The dawning realization that nothing before him made sense.The lake behind him was calm.Too calm.As if it had never held him at all.Arthur swallowed hard, his voice lower now, edged with something far more uncertain.“…Merlin?”No one answered.And the crowd only grew. ---------------------------* Or Arthur has finally returned and English is hard

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,970Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:

entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,100Chapters: 171/?Kudos: 147

entry.title: The Golden Prat
entry.summary:
Author: MY_CAR_IS_NOT_YELLOW

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,063Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: After six months at uni, Merlin ran out of funds and motivation and is now back in the same role he had been in for three years prior: waiter at medieval-fantasy-themed restaurant The Round Table. Everyone is delighted to have him back, of course, but Merlin's second-first-day jitters land him in the staff toilets with hot jam all over his only uniform. There, he meets the most gorgeous man he's ever seen. Too bad he's a prat.

entry.title: Forever Yours - Am Byth Yn Eiddo I Chi
entry.summary:
Author: Angelmann

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,874Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 28

Summary: King Arthur of Camelot faces catastrophe after catastrophe. His people and his land have fallen victim to reoccuring tragedies and despite their efforts, they are not only losing resources, but also hope. Arthur is in desperate need of a solution.An arranged marriage might save his people from impending doom, but Arthur has to face a long strained relationship with his neighbours, the Druids. Arthur and the Druid Emperor, Emrys, have to overcome their differences, but if they are willing to change is only written in the stars.

entry.title: Defying the prophecy
entry.summary:
Author: Transjellyfishboy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,881Chapters: 3/23Kudos: 3

Summary: This is a Merlin rewrite and I'm gonna be honest I have a lot of hopes and expectations for this so not sure if I'll ever finish.Merlin finds out about the prophecy and how things are supposed to play out and actively steers against it all. Basically imagine if Merlin saw everything how it played out in the show and then he, rethinks what to do and how to choose.

entry.title: Long Long Ago in the Here and Now
entry.summary:
Author: Love_to_Ship7

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,663Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 37

Summary: Merlin Emrys sat and stared at the new student info forms on his desk, while the children read quietly to themselves. After over fifteen hundred years, he couldn't allow the tiniest spark of hope to take shape until he knew for sure. The parents of the brother and sister joining his class were likely history buffs with a passion for Arthurian legends and nothing more. Nothing more than another heartbreak, just like the last twenty he'd followed up on in almost as many decades. He checked to see his students were still working, before taking a moment to close his eyes and remember. Faces, voices, and scents ran through his mind, and he longed for them to be more than distant memories. Damn his lonely heart. It was such a glutton for punishment.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Fate's Own Way
entry.summary:
Author: notyourstrawberrymilk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,362Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 328

Summary: When his father informs Arthur he must choose a queen, Arthur wants to enjoy his last days of freedom. On his trip, he is found wounded by druids who take him back to their camp where he is tortured (for lack of a better word) for information on Camelot by the chief druid, a man named Emrys. Despite their unconventional relationship - and having never seen the man with his own eyes - Arthur begins to fall for Emrys and the druid way of life. But with the threat of Uther finding the druids, Arthur must decide where his true loyalties lie. Spotify playlist ***WARNING! Non-con sexual elements and graphic depictions of violence.
